allow: Bash(xargs wc -l)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"Task\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } }"}')
Bash(python -m json.tool)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"Task\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ __type\(name: \\"Trader\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ item: __type\(name: \\"TaskObjectiveItem\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } } questItem: __type\(name: \\"TaskObjectiveQuestItem\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ req: __type\(name: \\"TaskStatusRequirement\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } rewards: __type\(name: \\"TaskRewards\\"\) { name fields { name type { name kind ofType { name kind ofType { name kind } } } } } }"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ tasks\(lang: en\) { id name wikiLink minPlayerLevel kappaRequired trader { id name normalizedName imageLink image4xLink } taskRequirements { task { id name } status } objectives { id type description optional ... on TaskObjectiveItem { count foundInRaid items { id name normalizedName iconLink gridImageLink } } } } }"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ traders\(lang: en\) { id name normalizedName imageLink image4xLink } }"}')
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); j.data.traders.forEach\(t=>console.log\(t.id, t.name, t.normalizedName\)\);")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query":"{ tasks\(lang: en, limit: 5\) { id name factionName kappaRequired lightkeeperRequired minPlayerLevel } }"}')
Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); console.log\(JSON.stringify\(JSON.parse\(d\).data.tasks, null, 2\)\);")

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{ traders\(lang: en\) { id name normalizedName imageLink image4xLink } }\\"}" -o C:/temp/traders.json)

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.tarkov.dev/graphql -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"query\\":\\"{ tasks\(lang: en, limit: 3\) { id name factionName kappaRequired lightkeeperRequired minPlayerLevel taskRequirements { task { id name } status } } }\\"}" -o C:/temp/tasks_sample.json)
